name: Create personal Maven repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 Maven 仓库

name: Complete first Maven build through Artifactory
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory 完成首次 Maven 构建
hint: cd modules/artifactory-maven/sample-project, configure Maven to resolve dependencies through your virtual repo, then run: jf mvn clean install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-maven-build --build-number=1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/artifactory-maven/sample-project，配置 Maven 通过虚拟仓库解析依赖，然后运行：jf mvn clean install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-maven-build --build-number=1

name: Publish Maven Build Info to Artifactory
name_cn: 发布 Maven Build Info 到 Artifactory
